title: Chemo Advice
body: Now that Im done with Chemo I thought I’d share some tips I learned from personal experience. #1 is a High Protein Diet. When I was diagnosed I went vegetarian and followed Dr Sebi’s alkaline diet which is cool pre and post chemo but wasnt helpful at all during Chemo. After my first round I lost 13lbs in 3 days and went to the doctors office for a check in and they saw my weight dropping and said nothing. Thank GOD my breastie I met here on Reddit checked in on me and I told her about the weight loss and she said that was BAD BAD BAD! I should be gaining weight on a high protein diet for the Chemo to work efficiently. She was 110% right because as soon as I changed my diet and started gaining weight the Chemo was a million times easier on my body. Another piece of advice was to stay away from high doses of Vitamin C and Antioxidants because they cancel out the Chemo and especially no Grapefruit. I could eat Vitamin C naturally found in food but no pills. While I was nauseous and had to put something in my stomach I would eat Plain Pasta with Olive Oil and Ghee or Plain White Rice with Ghee. Id mix in Protein Powder so get that Protein in also. Everything had a metallic taste and grossed me out so using wooden or plastic utensils helped alot with that. Zofran was cool for nausea but what really helped me enjoy food again was Kiva brand weed gummies. What I like about this brand is it doesnt give you cotton mouth and they dont make you tired. Besides that I recommend eating whatever you can because Chemo sucks and you need some joy wherever you can get it. Everyone and especially my doctors told me not to smoke weed, but one day I was feeling so low and depressed. I rolled a joint and smoked it and was like “ fuck it! ” It was literally the best medicine at that moment, I got up and enjoyed the fuck outta that day. After, I tried it in a water pipe and it wasnt the same as the joint. So do whatever you gotta do to get thru it and to hell what anyone says. You know your body better than anyone else does
